emails.subject: Still looking for answers, [FIRST_NAME]?
emails.preview: Why Delaware patients choose a different path
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you have been managing [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] without ever really getting to the bottom of it, you are not alone.

Most of our patients have been through the standard process — multiple specialists, prescriptions, referrals — and still don't have clear answers. That's not a failure on your part. It's a limitation of the conventional model.

At Delaware Integrative Medicine, Dr. Henry Childers takes a fundamentally different approach. As a board-certified surgeon with advanced training in integrative and regenerative medicine, Dr. Childers combines conventional diagnostic rigor with therapies like ozone, peptides, bioidentical hormones, stem cells, and IV nutrition to address what is actually driving your symptoms.

We treat conditions that other practices often cannot — Lyme disease, chronic pain, hormone imbalance, autoimmune disorders, weight issues, and more.

We are located in Georgetown, Delaware and serve patients from across the region.

If you are ready to take a different path to your health, we would be honored to work with you.

Warm regards,
The Team at Delaware Integrative Medicine
302-258-8853

emails.subject: The real reason your symptoms keep returning, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.preview: What most labs and doctors miss
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here is something many patients learn only after years of searching.

Conventional medicine is very good at identifying acute disease. What it often misses are the underlying metabolic, inflammatory, hormonal, or infectious imbalances that sit just below the threshold of a formal diagnosis — and that quietly drive symptoms for years.

That is the gap integrative medicine fills.

For example, Lyme disease and co-infections can persist long after standard treatment, causing fatigue, joint pain, and cognitive difficulty that standard labs won't catch without specialized testing. Hormone imbalances — particularly as we age — affect energy, mood, weight, and libido in ways that a basic panel may not reveal. Chronic inflammation driven by gut dysfunction, toxin accumulation, or autoimmune activity often appears 'normal' on routine bloodwork.

At Delaware Integrative Medicine, we look at all of it — using advanced testing, regenerative therapies, and targeted nutritional protocols to build a complete clinical picture.

When you understand what is actually happening in your body, the path forward becomes much clearer.

The Team at Delaware Integrative Medicine

emails.subject: What one of our Delaware patients experienced
emails.preview: A story worth reading before your next appointment
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

We want to share a story — with identifying details changed to protect the patient's privacy.

A patient in their mid-50s came to us after two years of debilitating joint pain, fatigue, and brain fog. They had been evaluated multiple times and received different diagnoses from different providers. Nothing brought lasting relief.

After a comprehensive intake and advanced testing, we identified a pattern consistent with chronic Lyme-related inflammation combined with significant hormonal decline. We built a personalized protocol including ozone therapy, bioidentical hormone optimization, and targeted IV nutrition support.

Over the following four months, this patient reported substantially reduced pain, clearer thinking, and the energy to return to activities they had given up. They continued as an active patient in our practice.

Results vary, and we cannot guarantee specific outcomes for any individual. What we can say is that we will not stop looking until we have the most complete picture possible.

If that approach sounds like what you've been missing, we have consultation appointments available.

The Team at Delaware Integrative Medicine
302-258-8853

*Individual results vary. This is not a guarantee of any specific clinical outcome.*

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: TOP-10 PRESENCE, BROKEN TRAFFIC CONVERSION
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Delaware Integrative Medicine holds 24 keywords in the top 10 — a stronger footprint than most small practices — yet generates only 274 monthly visitors. That disconnect signals a structural problem: rankings for low-volume or brand-adjacent terms that earn positions but not clicks. Position breakdown:

- Position 1–3: 7 keywords
- Position 4–10: 17 keywords
- Position 11–20: 23 keywords
- Positions 21+: 284 keywords

7 first-page-top-3 rankings is a real asset. The bottleneck is that most of those rankings are on terms that generate under 140 searches per month — meaning the practice is winning in thin traffic lanes while the high-volume queries for its category remain uncontested.

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
16 SERPs in this practice's topic space now trigger an AI Overview. Delaware Integrative Medicine is cited in 0 of them. With treatments like GLP-1, Lyme disease, ozone therapy, and peptide therapy all generating frequent informational queries, this practice is structurally positioned to earn AI citations — but has none. Every AI Overview that answers a patient question without citing this practice is a zero-cost referral lost.

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: GLP-1 WEIGHT LOSS & REGENERATIVE MEDICINE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
The practice offers a rare combination of GLP-1 weight loss, stem cell therapy, exosome therapy, ozone, and peptide therapy — all in high demand, all with weak local competition. Priority keyword cluster:

🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
